ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Bad Request: " ++ (error.description default "Invalid request format"), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "VALIDATION_ERROR" }

logger.doc:name: Log Validation Error
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'VALIDATION_ERROR', errorDescription: error.description, timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Resource not found", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "NOT_FOUND" }

logger.doc:name: Log Not Found
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'NOT_FOUND', timestamp: now()}]

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate - Method Not Allowed

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Method not allowed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED" }

logger.doc:name: Log Method Not Allowed
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED', timestamp: now()}]

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate - Unsupported Media Type

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Unsupported media type", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE" }

logger.doc:name: Log Unsupported Media Type
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE', timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Duplicate request detected. This message has already been processed.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "DUPLICATE_MESSAGE" }

logger.doc:name: Log Duplicate Message
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'DUPLICATE_MESSAGE', timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Service temporarily unavailable. Please retry later.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "CONNECTIVITY_ERROR", retryable: true }

logger.doc:name: Log Connectivity Error
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'CONNECTIVITY_ERROR', errorDescription: error.description, retryable: true, timestamp: now()}]

on-error-propagate.type: HTTP:BAD_REQUEST, HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED, HTTP:FORBIDDEN, HTTP:NOT_FOUND, HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, HTTP:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate - Downstream Error

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Downstream system error", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "DOWNSTREAM_ERROR", retryable: (error.errorType.identifier contains "TIMEOUT") or (error.errorType.identifier contains "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE") }

logger.doc:name: Log Downstream Error
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'DOWNSTREAM_ERROR', errorDescription: error.description, timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Data transformation error", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: "TRANSFORMATION_ERROR" }

logger.doc:name: Log Transformation Error
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: 'TRANSFORMATION_ERROR', errorDescription: error.description, timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, message: "Internal server error", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorType: error.errorType.identifier default "UNKNOWN_ERROR" }

logger.doc:name: Log Unknown Error
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: error.errorType.identifier, errorDescription: error.description, timestamp: now()}]
